languages.text: {n}Разъяренный вой скованного {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеноса{/g} сливается в единую какофонию со звуками перегруженного {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}толкователя{/g}.{/n} "Проклятые... последыши... вселенской энтропии... ничтожные создания поверженного... врага!" {n}Некрон тщетно пытается вырваться из своего узилища.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Разъяренный вой скованного {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеноса{/g} сливается в единую какофонию со звуками перегруженного {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}толкователя{/g}.{/n} "Проклятые... последыши... вселенской энтропии... ничтожные создания поверженного... врага!" {n}Некрон тщетно пытается вырваться из своего узилища.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The enraged howls of the bound {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} merge with the sounds of the overloaded {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Разъяренный вой скованного {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеноса{/g} сливается в единую какофонию со звуками перегруженного {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}толкователя{/g}.{/n} "Проклятые... последыши... вселенской энтропии... ничтожные создания поверженного... врага!" {n}Некрон тщетно пытается вырваться из своего узилища.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The enraged howls of the bound xenos merge with the sounds of the overloaded Elucidator to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

{n}The enraged howls of the bound xenos merge with the sounds of the overloaded Elucidator to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

{n}The enraged howls of the bound xenos merge with the sounds of the overloaded Elucidator to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

languages.text: {n}被缚{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}发出狂怒的嚎叫，与过载的{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}阐释器{/g}噪音交织成一片刺耳杂音。{/n}“该死的……宇宙熵增……侏儒……落败的……卑贱生物！”{n}太空死灵试图挣脱束缚，终是徒劳。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enraged howls of the bound {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} merge with the sounds of the overloaded {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}被缚{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}发出狂怒的嚎叫，与过载的{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}阐释器{/g}噪音交织成一片刺耳杂音。{/n}“该死的……宇宙熵增……侏儒……落败的……卑贱生物！”{n}太空死灵试图挣脱束缚，终是徒劳。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los aullidos furiosos del {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} atrapado se juntan con los sonidos sobrecargados del {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Dilucidador{/g} para formar una cacofonía.{/n} «¡Malditos... retoños... de la entropía universal... criaturas indignas del enemigo... derrotado!». {n}El Necrón intenta escapar de su prisión, sin éxito.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enraged howls of the bound {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} merge with the sounds of the overloaded {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los aullidos furiosos del {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} atrapado se juntan con los sonidos sobrecargados del {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Dilucidador{/g} para formar una cacofonía.{/n} «¡Malditos... retoños... de la entropía universal... criaturas indignas del enemigo... derrotado!». {n}El Necrón intenta escapar de su prisión, sin éxito.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les hurlements rageurs du {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} prisonnier se mêlent aux sons de l'{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}élucidateur{/g} en surcharge pour former une bruyante cacophonie.{/n} « Maudits... avortons... du chaos universel... Créatures inférieures de l'adversaire... vaincu ! » {n}En vain, le Nécron tente de se libérer de sa prison.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enraged howls of the bound {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} merge with the sounds of the overloaded {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les hurlements rageurs du {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} prisonnier se mêlent aux sons de l'{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}élucidateur{/g} en surcharge pour former une bruyante cacophonie.{/n} « Maudits... avortons... du chaos universel... Créatures inférieures de l'adversaire... vaincu ! » {n}En vain, le Nécron tente de se libérer de sa prison.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bağlı {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenonun{/g} öfkeli ulumaları, fazla yüklenmiş {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Aydınlatıcı'nın{/g} sesleriyle birleşerek tek bir kakofoni meydana getiriyor.{/n} "Evrensel entropinin... Lanet... Bücürleri... Yenilmiş... Düşmanın... Aşağılık yaratıkları!" {n}Nekron, tıkıldığı kodesten çıkmak için boş yere çabalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enraged howls of the bound {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} merge with the sounds of the overloaded {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bağlı {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenonun{/g} öfkeli ulumaları, fazla yüklenmiş {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Aydınlatıcı'nın{/g} sesleriyle birleşerek tek bir kakofoni meydana getiriyor.{/n} "Evrensel entropinin... Lanet... Bücürleri... Yenilmiş... Düşmanın... Aşağılık yaratıkları!" {n}Nekron, tıkıldığı kodesten çıkmak için boş yere çabalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das wütende Geheul des gefangenen {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} vermischt sich mit den Geräuschen des überladenen {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidators{/g}.{/n} "Verfluchte ... Kümmerlinge ... einer universellen Entropie ... niedere Kreaturen des vernichteten ... Feindes!" {n}Der Necron versucht vergeblich, sich aus seinem Gefängnis zu befreien.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enraged howls of the bound {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} merge with the sounds of the overloaded {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das wütende Geheul des gefangenen {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} vermischt sich mit den Geräuschen des überladenen {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidators{/g}.{/n} "Verfluchte ... Kümmerlinge ... einer universellen Entropie ... niedere Kreaturen des vernichteten ... Feindes!" {n}Der Necron versucht vergeblich, sich aus seinem Gefängnis zu befreien.{/n}

languages.text: {n}怒り狂った縛られた{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異種族{/g}の唸り声と、過負荷の{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}エルシダート{/g}の音が一つに重なり合う。{/n} 「呪われた... ちび... 宇宙のエントロピー... 敗者の卑劣な生き物... 敵！」 {n}ネクロは牢獄から脱出を試みるが無駄に終わる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enraged howls of the bound {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} merge with the sounds of the overloaded {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} to form a single cacophony.{/n} "Cursed... runts... of universal entropy... lowly creatures of the vanquished... foe!" {n}The Necron tries in vain to break free from its prison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}怒り狂った縛られた異種族の唸り声と、過負荷のエルシダートの音が一つに重なり合う.{/n} 「呪われた... ちび... 宇宙のエントロピー... 敗者の卑劣な生き物... 敵！」 {n}ネクロは牢獄から脱出を試みるが無駄に終わる.{/n}
{n}怒り狂った縛られた{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異種族{/g}の唸り声と、過負荷の{g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}エルシダート{/g}の音が一つに重なり合う。{/n} 「呪われた... ちび... 宇宙のエントロピー... 敗者の卑劣な生き物... 敵！」 {n}ネクロは牢獄から脱出を試みるが無駄に終わる。{/n}
